title: stanleya tomentosa
intro: Stanleya tomentosa, also known as elephant head, is a perennial plant native to the northwestern parts of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a laxative and to treat skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems contain glycosides, which have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain. The roots and leaves of Stanleya tomentosa are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
